utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not know how any of these got opened ? !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not know how any of these got opened ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know ! I know ! I am a terrible person ! I mean , Chandler is never going to trust me with anything ever again !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am a terrible person ! I mean , Chandler is never going to trust me with anything ever again !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh hey ! You got my parent gift !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I do not know . I think it does something to salami .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I think it does something to salami .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah . What ... what did Tag say ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Tag is not the father ! And Joey knows now ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do Rach . I do , and I so happy for you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh wow , you did not even try to unhook my bra !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: So are you ever gonna tell whoever it is ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , I will . I am just not up for it tonight .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey Rach listen , no matter what this guy says I want you to know you are not gonna be alone in this .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Listen I uh ... It is a scary world out there especially if you are a single mom .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , I always felt like you and I have this ... this special bond .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So , Rachel Green will you marry me ?
